title: Color Coding Calendar Widget
excerpt: Hello! I am new to Monday.com.  I created a main table to track our team travel and want everyone to be able to view it in the Calendar Widget. Is there a way to color code it to visually distinguish who is traveling? (E…

posts.author: TensorTrish (Trish Boh)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! I am new to Monday.com. I created a main table to track our team travel and want everyone to be able to view it in the Calendar Widget. Is there a way to color code it to visually distinguish who is traveling? (Ex. Jane’s travel is blue, Bob’s is green, Diane’s is purple, etc.) Thank you!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
In the calendar widget, you’ll want to go to settings and then choose your people column as the ‘color by’.

image399×588 20.8 KB

posts.author: TensorTrish (Trish Boh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for trying to help! However, I don’t see Widget settings as you show. This is what I see when I click on the Calendar widget and I don’t know what I’m doing wrong.

image919×951 52.2 KB

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
That’s the ‘tab’ settings. You’ll want to look at the calendar settings.

image369×104 2.07 KB
